summary: Phase 3.7c Testing Complete - Teacher Dashboard, Consent UI, Onboarding Tour, nscale AI provider, 4 role logins, DE/EN i18n, WhatsApp link update. All 19 backend tests passed. All frontend tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Teacher Dashboard correctly shows data protection info banner (Datenschutzhinweis)
Teacher sees limited nav (only 'Mein Dashboard'), no Kanban access - correct role-based UI
Consent Page shows GDPR-compliant consent card with scope/excludes, grant/revoke buttons, history
Onboarding Tour shows 5-step modal for new applicants with localStorage persistence
WhatsApp link correctly updated to wa.me/4915208496876 on /contact page
nscale AI provider configured with 4 task-based models (screening, classification, summary, suggestion)
All 4 seeded accounts work: admin (superadmin), staff, teacher, applicant
seed_data_creation: 4 accounts seeded via seed.py (admin uses ADMIN_PASSWORD, others use SEED_DEV_PASSWORD)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3.7c complete. Teacher Dashboard at /staff (auto-routes teacher role). Consent Page at /portal/consents. Onboarding Tour shows once per user (localStorage). nscale AI provider with 4 models. WhatsApp: wa.me/4915208496876. Cost simulator is MOCKED internally.
passed_checks: Backend: Health endpoint returns OK with email_enabled=true
Backend: Admin login (admin@studienkolleg-aachen.de / Admin@2026!) - role: superadmin
Backend: Staff login (staff@studienkolleg-aachen.de / DevSeed@2026!) - role: staff
Backend: Teacher login (teacher@studienkolleg-aachen.de / DevSeed@2026!) - role: teacher
Backend: Applicant login (applicant@studienkolleg-aachen.de / DevSeed@2026!) - role: applicant
Backend: Invalid login returns 401
Backend: GET /api/teacher/my-students returns students list (consent-checked)
Backend: GET /api/teacher/assignments returns teacher assignments
Backend: Teacher endpoint requires auth (401 without)
Backend: Applicant cannot access teacher endpoints (403)
Backend: Staff can list all assignments
Backend: GET /api/consents/types returns teacher_data_access consent definition
Backend: POST /api/consents/grant creates consent record
Backend: GET /api/consents/my returns consent history
Backend: POST /api/consents/revoke/{type} revokes consent
Backend: GET /api/ai/model-registry returns nscale provider with 4 models
Backend: AI model registry requires staff role (403 for applicant)
Backend: AI model registry requires auth (401 without)
Frontend: Homepage DE/EN toggle works
Frontend: Contact page WhatsApp link points to wa.me/4915208496876
Frontend: Teacher login redirects to /staff with TeacherDashboard
Frontend: TeacherDashboard shows data protection info banner
Frontend: TeacherDashboard shows stats (Zugewiesene Lernende, Eingeschrieben, In Bearbeitung)
Frontend: Teacher sees limited nav (only 'Mein Dashboard')
Frontend: Applicant login redirects to /portal
Frontend: Onboarding Tour modal appears for new applicants (5 steps)
Frontend: Onboarding Tour has Next/Skip buttons, progress bar
Frontend: Consent Page at /portal/consents loads correctly
Frontend: Consent Page shows teacher_data_access consent card
Frontend: Consent Page shows scope (Full Name, Email, etc.) and excludes (Financial Data, etc.)
Frontend: Grant Consent button works, shows 'Active' status
Frontend: Revoke Consent button works, shows 'Not granted' status
Frontend: Consent history shows grant/revoke timestamps
Frontend: Staff login redirects to /staff with StaffDashboard
Frontend: Staff sees Kanban Board nav item
Frontend: Admin login redirects to /staff, can access /admin panel
Frontend: Admin panel shows Dashboard, Nutzer, Audit Logs nav
